title: Conferment Ceremony Memories 2023
description: The data consists of writings related to conferment ceremony memories. In the open writing call people were asked to write about their memories and experiences of the conferment ceremonies. The respondents were asked whether they had participated in a conferment ceremony at a Finnish university and what their experience of participating in a ceremony was like.
